title: Fast Heartbeat Does Not Auto-Continue Work
content: The selena-fast-heartbeat cron delivers to Discord #selena-project channel but does not automatically continue work. It only notifies, it does not execute. Human or agent needs to pick up the work

title: Save File Incompatibility
content: When entity structures change (power_tier, entity_history, etc.), old save files become incompatible. Solution: delete save.owbl files and start fresh. Location: world_data/save.owbl
